_meta.title: OmegaX Protocol — Full Coverage Health Plan: Working Adults
_meta.author: OmegaX Health devnet fixture
_meta.note: This model is international and currency-agnostic in principle. USD is used as the reference unit. Contrast with the Italian rehabilitation plans (EUR) in this same repository.

populationProfile.riskProfile: Standard — no chronic disease exclusions modelled at this stage
excludedConditions: experimental treatments not approved by oracle network
populationProfile.notes: Utilization rates calibrated against international private medical insurance (iPMI) benchmarks for working-age adults in mid-to-high income economies.

hospitalization.description: In-patient hospital stays including acute surgery, ICU, room and board
hospitalization.oracleVerification: Hospital discharge summary + DRG code + treating physician attestation

emergency.description: Emergency room visits, urgent care, ambulance transport

preventive.description: Annual health check-up, routine vaccinations, cancer screening (colonoscopy, mammography, PSA)

advanced-diagnostics.description: MRI, CT scan, PET scan, echocardiography, biopsy

specialists.description: Outpatient specialist consultations (cardiology, oncology, orthopaedics, neurology, etc.)

rehabilitation.description: General physical, occupational, and speech rehabilitation (not condition-specific). Complements dedicated condition plans (THR, TKR, RSP, Stroke).
rehabilitation.oracleVerification: Therapy attendance logs + functional outcome score
rehabilitation.note: For condition-specific post-surgical rehabilitation, see italy-thr/tkr/rsp/stroke-rehab-model.json

mental-health.description: Psychotherapy sessions, psychiatric consultations, inpatient mental health stays

dental.description: Conservative dentistry (fillings, root canals, extractions) and minor prosthetics. Orthodontics excluded.

maternity.description: Prenatal care, delivery (natural and C-section), postnatal care, neonatal care up to 30 days

oncology-catastrophic.description: Cancer treatment (surgery, chemotherapy, radiation, targeted therapy, immunotherapy), major cardiac surgery, organ transplants, complex neurosurgery
oncology-catastrophic.oracleVerification: Oncologist/specialist treatment plan + staged disbursement attestations
oncology-catastrophic.disbursementModel: Staged — 30% at treatment initiation, 40% at mid-treatment milestone, 30% at completion and outcome attestation

medications.description: Prescription medications (formulary-based). Includes oncology drugs within oncology-catastrophic module.
medications.oracleVerification: Pharmacy dispensing records + prescribing physician attestation

bronze.intendedFor: Essential private protection. Covers the most financially significant acute events. Suits healthy individuals seeking hospital + emergency cover on top of any public safety net.

silver.intendedFor: Comprehensive cover for working adults with families. Adds specialist access, advanced imaging, mental health, and dental — the categories most used by 35–55 age group.

gold.intendedFor: Full-spectrum protection. Designed for breadwinners and families needing catastrophic coverage (oncology, transplants, cardiac surgery) alongside comprehensive day-to-day health access.
gold.healthAlphaMeasure: ECOG Performance Status <= 2 (post-oncology) / EQ-5D-5L VAS >= 75 (general annual review)

actuarialModel.formula: premium = ceil(n × utilization × annualCap × (1 + buffer) / n)
actuarialModel.note: Utilization represents the fraction of members filing a claim that reaches or approaches the tier cap within the cycle. Lower for Gold (rare catastrophic events) vs Silver (higher frequency of smaller claims).

sponsorSeed.rationale: Covers 5 worst-case Gold catastrophic claims at the per-event module cap (5 × 100000 = 500000 USD). Ensures pool solvency before annual premium float fully accumulates in year 1.

lpBackstop.rationale: 6% weight (600 bps) — largest absolute backstop in the protocol. Covers 3 additional worst-case Gold members exhausting the annual Gold cap (3 × 200000 = 600000 USD) above actuarial expectation.

oracleArchitecture.overview: Claims verification is modular per coverage category. Each module has a defined oracle permission level and attestation data type. Multi-step catastrophic claims use staged disbursement with milestone attestations.

permissions.ORACLE_PERMISSION_DATA_ATTEST: Used for diagnostic reports, therapy logs, prescription records — data input without direct payment trigger
permissions.ORACLE_PERMISSION_CLAIM_SETTLE: Used for discharge summaries, surgical outcomes, treatment completion — triggers payment release
permissions.ORACLE_PERMISSION_QUOTE: Used for pre-authorisation of elective procedures and cost estimates before treatment

moduleOracleMap.trigger: Staged: treatment plan → mid-treatment → ECOG outcome

silver.note: Reserved at full Silver cap pending surgical outcome. Actual disbursement expected ~26500 USD.

gold.scenario: Stage 2 breast cancer — full treatment cycle
gold.outcomeMeasure: ECOG Performance Status 1 at treatment completion

comparisonWithRehabPlans.note: This plan operates alongside the condition-specific Italian rehab plans in the same ReserveDomain. Key structural differences:

differences.rehabPlans: Single condition — surgical + rehabilitation pathway only

differences.fullCover: $100,000 per catastrophic event; $200,000 annual Gold cap
Can be held alongside a condition-specific plan (e.g. Gold + THR plan for a patient undergoing hip replacement)
differences.rehabPlans: Condition-specific — triggered by a specific surgical event
